organization.name: Next Tech Lab AP
organization.type: Student-led innovation hub and research laboratory
organization.mission: To reverse brain-drain and foster deep research culture in India through interdisciplinary student innovation.
organization.description: A collaborative, non-hierarchical student research lab focused on solving real-world problems using cutting-edge technologies, participating in global competitions, publishing research, and building prototype solutions. Next Tech Lab hosts workshops, paper reading sessions, game jams, hackathons, and project expos to enhance student skills.
other_campuses: SRM Institute of Science and Technology (Chennai)
recognition: Silver Winner — QS Reimagine Education Award (Student-Led Innovation, 2018)

contact.address: SRM University, Andhra Pradesh V-203, Neerukonda

history.inspiration: MIT Media Lab collaborative research model

timeline.event: Founded after founders spent a semester at MIT
Next Tech Lab established at SRM University-AP Amaravati campus
Won QS Reimagine Education Silver Award for Student-Led Innovation at Wharton School

achievements_and_recognition: Only Indian organization to win QS Reimagine Education Award (2018)
Participation in global events such as Game Developers Conference
Members showcased work at India HCI Conference and international summits
Advisors from institutions like MIT, Google Brain, University of Cambridge and Harvard
Official member of ICXR international XR research network
Students have excelled at hackathons like ETH Denver (2020) and national hackathons
activities: Next Tech Lab Expos and project showcases

labs.name: McCarthy Lab

guiding_quote.text: Our ultimate objective is to make programs that learn from their experience as effectively as humans do. We shall say that a program has common sense if it automatically deduces for itself a sufficient wide class of immediate consequences of anything it is told and what it already knows.
guiding_quote.author: John McCarthy

labs.description: McCarthy Lab serves as the intellectual hub for artificial intelligence, focusing on the development of novel algorithms across supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning. Research ranges from refining classical statistical models to architecting sophisticated deep learning networks, seeking a rigorous mathematical understanding of why specific computational methods succeed, grounded in both theory and practical experimentation.

labs.name: Pausch Lab

guiding_quote.text: Experience is what you get when you didn't get what you wanted. And experience is often the most valuable thing you have to offer.
guiding_quote.author: Randy Pausch

labs.description: Pausch Lab is a hub of immersive media, specializing in AR, VR, extended reality, and 2D and 3D game development. The lab is dedicated to redefining digital interaction by creating highly engaging and spatially aware virtual environments, extending beyond traditional gaming to fully interactive simulations that craft compelling spatial experiences driven by real-time rendering engines.

labs.name: Tesla Lab

guiding_quote.text: Be alone, that is the secret of invention; be alone, that is when ideas are born.
guiding_quote.author: Nikola Tesla

labs.description: Tesla Lab is a center of hardware innovation, specializing in electronics, embedded systems, and microcontroller architectures. The lab is dedicated to bridging the physical and digital worlds by designing highly efficient and responsive circuitry, extending beyond standard hardware design to complex IoT integrations, engineering robust physical solutions driven by real-time operating systems and edge computing.

labs.name: Satoshi Lab

guiding_quote.text: If you don't believe me or don't get it, I don't have time to try to convince you, sorry.
guiding_quote.author: Satoshi Nakamoto

labs.description: Satoshi Lab stands at the forefront of Web3 and digital security, focusing on decentralized architectures and modern defense mechanisms. Research encompasses cryptocurrency, malware analysis, and network security, with a specialized emphasis on penetration testing and reverse engineering. By integrating threat research with advanced cryptography and secure coding, the lab empowers members to engineer resilient, trustless systems.

projects.name: dPIN
projects.description: Distributed and trustless infrastructure monitoring network

labs.name: Norman Lab

guiding_quote.text: A product is more than its features. It is an experience — an experience shaped by expectations, context, culture, and emotion. Designers must understand people before they try to design for them.
guiding_quote.author: Don Norman

labs.description: Norman Lab is a center of innovation, specializing in web development, app development, cloud computing, and UI/UX design. The lab is dedicated to pushing the boundaries of online experiences by creating seamless and user-friendly interfaces, extending beyond typical web apps into app development with creative, cutting-edge solutions.
